# nlohmann/json

Vendored single-header JSON parser for MilkyWayIME layout data loading.

- Upstream: https://github.com/nlohmann/json
- Release: v3.12.0
- File: `single_include/nlohmann/json.hpp`
- Source URL: https://github.com/nlohmann/json/releases/download/v3.12.0/json.hpp
- SHA-256: `AAF127C04CB31C406E5B04A63F1AE89369FCCDE6D8FA7CDDA1ED4F32DFC5DE63`
- License: MIT

This project vendors only the release single header. Package manager integration
is intentionally not used for the current MSBuild setup.
